name: Metal Desk
description: A sturdy metal desk bolted to the floor beside your bunk.

name: Long Shelf
description: A long metal shelf mounted to the wall above the desk.

name: Small Desk
description: A basic small desk attached to the wall beside the bunk.

name: Small Table
description: A small table bolted to the galley floor.

name: Shelving Unit
description: A wall-mounted shelving unit beside the galley entrance.

name: Metal Bench
description: A heavy metal bench fixed to the wall of the storage room.

description: A narrow shelf mounted above the medical cabinet.

name: Workbench
description: A long, heavy-duty workbench running along the engineering bay wall.

name: Shelving Unit
description: A large wall-mounted shelving unit on the cargo bay wall.
